overview: The Village of Weston Plan Commission approved the site plan for the new Mountain Bay Metropolitan Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive, and adopted a new salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection districts. Both items passed unanimously with all commissioners present voting in favor.

agenda.item: Call to order and roll call
Site plan review for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive
Salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection district
April 2026 staff approved certified survey maps and site plans
Planning and development department monthly project update
Future agenda items and staff comments

discussions.item: Site plan review for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility
discussions.body: Staff presented the site plan for the new police department and municipal court at 3600 Community Center Drive. The building was rotated to address challenges with a gas pipeline running under the parking lot and to reduce fill costs. Chief Jeremy explained the building has capacity for 50-60 officers versus current staffing of 40, with expansion possible to the north. An alternate storage shed is proposed but may be deferred based on bid costs. Commissioner Garant made the motion with conditions 2-5, which passed unanimously. Discussion included questions about future expandability and positioning of the alternate shed to accommodate future growth.

discussions.item: Salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection district
discussions.body: Jennifer presented a new inspection program requiring two annual inspections per salt storage facility in wellhead protection areas - one warm weather inspection focusing on structural integrity and one winter operational inspection. A standardized inspection worksheet similar to DOT's format will be used. Staff identified one existing facility near Sternberg that predates the wellhead protection ordinance and has never gone through the conditional use process. The commission agreed staff should reach out to bring them into compliance. Motion to approve passed unanimously with amendment to report back to both Plan Commission and Public Works committee.
Motion to approve minutes as presented was made, seconded, and passed unanimously with no discussion.

discussions.item: April 2026 staff approved certified survey maps and site plans
Planning and development department monthly project update
discussions.body: Jennifer announced the first joint Plan Commission and Village Board steering committee meeting for the comprehensive plan is scheduled for Monday, June 1st at 5:00 p.m. She will send email and calendar invites to members.

publicComment: Jim Pensel of 5002 Arrow Street, Weston spoke via online participation. He urged the commission to exercise common sense regarding landscaping requirements for the police department project, referencing relaxed standards applied to the Green Heck Turner building. He also requested the commission require annual reporting on the salt shed inspection program to track compliance over time.
actionItems: Site plan for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive approved with staff conditions 2-5
Salt storage shed inspection program adopted for wellhead protection district with two annual inspections per facility
Staff to report back on salt shed inspection program to both Plan Commission and Public Works committee next year
Staff to reach out to existing salt storage facility on Sternberg that has not gone through wellhead protection conditional use process
Joint Plan Commission and Village Board steering committee meeting for comprehensive plan scheduled for June 1st at 5:00 p.m.
Staff to send presentation on residential TIF district qualifications to commission members
title: Plan Commission
